languages.text: {n}И до того проклятое место стало теперь обителью ксеночудовищ, забившихся в коридоры гробницы. Железным мертвецам придется немало потрудиться,, прежде чем они снова смогут обрести свободу.{/n}
{n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}И до того проклятое место стало теперь обителью ксеночудовищ, забившихся в коридоры гробницы. Железным мертвецам придется немало потрудиться,, прежде чем они снова смогут обрести свободу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}
{n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}
{n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}

languages.text: {n}そして、その呪われた場所は異形生物の住処となり、墓の通路に異形生物が押し寄せた。鉄の死者の自由を取り戻すのは容易なことではないだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}そして、その呪われた場所は異形生物の住処となり、墓の通路に異形生物が押し寄せた。鉄の死者の自由を取り戻すのは容易なことではないだろう。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Así fue que el lugar maldito se convirtió en el hogar de xenomonstruos, que abarrotaron los pasillos de la tumba. Para los muertos férreos, recuperar la libertad no será tarea fácil.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Así fue que el lugar maldito se convirtió en el hogar de xenomonstruos, que abarrotaron los pasillos de la tumba. Para los muertos férreos, recuperar la libertad no será tarea fácil.{/n}

languages.text: {n}于是，那片诅咒之地成了异形怪物的巢窟。它们塞满了墓穴的每一条通道。那些铁块死人休想轻易重获自由。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}于是，那片诅咒之地成了异形怪物的巢窟。它们塞满了墓穴的每一条通道。那些铁块死人休想轻易重获自由。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Und so wurde dieser verfluchte Ort zu einer Heimstatt von Xenomonstern, die sich in den Korridoren des Grabes zusammenscharten. Es wird für die Eisentoten nicht einfach sein, ihre Freiheit zurückzuerlangen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Und so wurde dieser verfluchte Ort zu einer Heimstatt von Xenomonstern, die sich in den Korridoren des Grabes zusammenscharten. Es wird für die Eisentoten nicht einfach sein, ihre Freiheit zurückzuerlangen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Böylece o lanetli yer, mezarın koridorlarına doluşan zeno yaratıklarına ev sahipliği yaptı. Demir ölüler için özgürlüklerini geri kazanmak kolay olmayacak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Böylece o lanetli yer, mezarın koridorlarına doluşan zeno yaratıklarına ev sahipliği yaptı. Demir ölüler için özgürlüklerini geri kazanmak kolay olmayacak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'endroit maudit devint aussi le foyer des monstres xénos, qui s'étaient amassés dans les couloirs du tombeau. Il ne serait pas aisé pour les morts de fer de regagner leur liberté.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And so that cursed place became home to xenomonsters, who packed themselves into the corridors of the tomb. For the iron dead, regaining their freedom will be no easy task.{/n}
